criteria.criterion: NodeFsBackend.stat() returns accurate size and mtime
OPFSBackend.stat() implemented using FileSystemFileHandle.getFile()
AgenticFileSystem.ls() populates size/mtime when stat() available
AgenticFileSystem.tree() populates size/mtime when stat() available
stat() returns null for missing files without throwing
AgenticStoreBackend.list() returns all paths with / prefix
AgenticStoreBackend.scan() returns normalized paths
AgenticStoreBackend.scanStream() yields normalized paths
Consistency test: all backends return identical path formats
Concurrent write tests: 10+ parallel writes succeed
Race condition tests: concurrent writes to same file
Empty path tests: empty string paths handled gracefully
Special character tests: spaces, unicode, dots work
Tests run against all 5 backends
README performance table with read/write speeds for small files
README performance table includes large file read speed
README performance table includes storage limits
README performance table includes browser support matrix
README performance table includes recommended use cases
README table covers all 5 backends
